architecturalFeatures.en: Smaller Southern Fujian temple with relatively understated decoration; retains the unembellished character of early folk temples.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 規模較小的閩南廟宇，建築裝飾較為樸實，保留了早期民間廟宇不過度雕琢的原始面貌。

en: Note: One of Tainan's earliest Jade Emperor temples; preserves original, unadorned character
zh: 特色：台南最早玉皇信仰廟宇之一，保存原始質樸風貌

historicalContext.en: Among Tainan's earliest Jade Emperor temples, predating Taiwan's First Heaven Temple; preserves the original character of Jade Emperor worship in Tainan.
historicalContext.zh: 為台南最早奉祀玉皇大帝的廟宇之一，建廟歷史悠久，在台灣首廟天壇興建之前即已存在，保存了台南玉皇信仰的原始面貌。

modernUse.en: Still serves as a community faith center maintained by local residents; a representative case of Tainan's alleyway temple culture preservation.
modernUse.zh: 現仍作為社區信仰中心，由在地居民維護，是台南巷弄廟宇文化保存的代表案例。

description.en: Simple facade beauty: Shoot the temple front straight-on with a standard lens; emphasize the clean, understated architectural lines.
description.zh: 廟宇正面簡樸之美：以標準鏡頭平視拍攝廟宇正面，強調建築樸實無華的線條美感。

description.en: Temple in streetscape: Step back to include the surrounding old-city street; show how the temple is woven into the urban fabric.
description.zh: 老城區街景帶廟：退後至街道取景，將廟宇納入老城區街景中，呈現信仰融入城市紋理的場景。

description.en: Shrine offering details: Shoot the arrangement of offerings at the shrine; note the layered colors of fruit, flowers, and the incense burner.
description.zh: 神龕細節：拍攝廟內神龕供品擺設，注意水果、花卉與香爐的色彩搭配層次。

whyItMatters.en: One of the earliest temples in Tainan dedicated to the Jade Emperor; woven into the daily life of old-city residents — important in status but modest in scale, embodying the multi-layered nature of Tainan's faith.
whyItMatters.zh: 台南最早奉祀玉皇大帝的廟宇之一，融入老城區居民日常生活，地位重要但規模質樸，體現台南信仰多元層次。
